cover.subtitle:
두 차례 개헌으로
장기집권을 시도하다.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a large stack of legal documents (constitution-style) on a wooden government desk, with a wooden gavel resting on top. Behind the desk: an empty tall-backed leather chair facing forward. To one side: a small line of military police silhouettes in helmets standing at attention. Background: a dark blue-gray wall with a faint stylized Korean flag silhouette. Color: warm gray base + amber gavel + small red accent on a torn paper. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.name: 이승만
items.desc: 두 차례 개헌으로 영구 집권 시도.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 발췌개헌(직선제)과 사사오입(중임 제한 철폐)의 차이, 진보당 사건의 평화통일론, 3·15 부정선거가 4·19 혁명의 직접 원인이라는 점이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small wooden gavel silhouette with a constitution-style document. Cream #F5EFE4 base + amber #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
